title: ADAPT-VQE: Adaptive Derivative-Assembled Pseudo-Trotter Ansatz
description: Master the ADAPT-VQE algorithm that dynamically constructs optimal quantum circuits by iteratively adding operators from a predefined pool based on gradient information.
learningObjectives: Understand the limitations of fixed ansatz structures in VQE
Explain the ADAPT-VQE algorithm and its iterative circuit construction
Define and construct operator pools for molecular systems
Implement ADAPT-VQE for simple molecular systems
Compare ADAPT-VQE performance against fixed-depth ansatze
